name: Controller Core Structure
requirement: I need to design a speed control system.
summary: English-formatted controller-body structure with unique ids for each loop and connection.

blocks.name: speed_loop
blocks.role: Outer loop that converts speed error into torque demand.
blocks.notes: Outer loop that converts speed error into torque demand.

blocks.name: current_loop
blocks.role: Inner loop that converts current error into voltage demand.
blocks.notes: Inner loop that converts current error into voltage demand.

edges.description: Speed loop output becomes the current reference for the inner loop.

design_rules: All text must be written in English.
Every block and edge must have a unique and stable id.
Only controller-body loops are allowed; no protection, modulation, or state-machine blocks.
The hierarchy should reflect the requested cascade, such as position -> speed -> torque -> voltage.
Each loop should expose a clear reference input and a clear feedback input when applicable.
